commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b24b4c7693cf52d176ded20e87ed6a6c6905e6a2)
commands.review_summary:
The branch stores plugin runtimes on channel registry entries, adds a gateway hook to seed bundled channel runtime setters before startup, updates Feishu monitor runtime initialization, and adds mocked regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +59, Tests +85. Total +144 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the issue logs match current main where Feishu monitor startup never seeds `setFeishuRuntime()` before handlers call `getFeishuRuntime()`. I did not establish a live Feishu WebSocket repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review and contributor follow-up are needed because the code still misses the production registry metadata path and the contributor must supply real Feishu behavior proof.
